recommendations.title: Mountains May Depart
recommendations.overview: The life of Tao, and those close to her, is explored in three different time periods: 1999, 2014, and 2025.

recommendations.title: Pickpocket
recommendations.overview: A small town pickpocket whose friends have moved on to higher trades finds himself bitter and unable to adapt.

recommendations.title: Ash Is Purest White
recommendations.overview: Set in China's underworld, this tale of love and betrayal follows a dancer who fired a gun to protect her mobster boyfriend during a fight. On release from prison 5 years later, she sets out to find him.

recommendations.title: Still Life
recommendations.overview: A town in Fengjie county is gradually being demolished and flooded to make way for the Three Gorges Dam. A man and woman visit the town to locate their estranged spouses, and become witness to the societal changes.

recommendations.title: Batman Begins
recommendations.overview: Driven by tragedy, billionaire Bruce Wayne dedicates his life to uncovering and defeating the corruption that plagues his home, Gotham City.  Unable to work within the system, he instead creates a new identity, a symbol of fear for the criminal under

recommendations.title: Rashomon
recommendations.overview: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.

recommendations.title: On the Waterfront
recommendations.overview: A prizefighter-turned-longshoreman with a conscience goes up against labor leaders to expose corruption, extortion, and murder among the union ranks.

recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.

recommendations.title: Gold Brick
recommendations.overview: Determined to even the scales and profit from his thankless job, a factory worker schemes to traffic luxury perfumes from under his employer's nose.

recommendations.title: The Sadness
recommendations.overview: A young couple is pushed to the limits of sanity as they attempt to be reunited amid the chaos of a pandemic outbreak. The streets erupt into violence and depravity, as those infected are driven to enact the most cruel and ghastly things imaginable.
